name: mailtrap-mcpb
description: Send emails and manage templates using Mailtrap
long_description:
**[Mailtrap.io](https://mailtrap.io)** is a comprehensive email platform that helps developers and teams test, debug, and deliver emails safely. It provides both email testing (sandbox) and email delivery services. 
 This MCP (Model Context Protocol) server provides AI assistants with the ability to: 
 - **Send emails** via Mailtrap's delivery API 
 - **Test emails** using Mailtrap's sandbox environment 
 - **Manage email templates** (create, update, delete, list).

tools.name: send-email
tools.description: Send emails via Mailtrap's delivery API with support for HTML/text content and multiple recipients.

tools.name: create-template
tools.description: Create a new email template in Mailtrap.

tools.name: list-templates
tools.description: List all email templates in your Mailtrap account.

tools.name: update-template
tools.description: Update an existing email template in Mailtrap.

tools.name: delete-template
tools.description: Delete an email template from Mailtrap.

tools.name: send-sandbox-email
tools.description: Send test emails to Mailtrap's sandbox environment without delivering to real recipients.

tools.name: get-sandbox-messages
tools.description: Get list of messages from the sandbox test inbox.

tools.name: show-sandbox-email-message
tools.description: Show sandbox email message details and content, with optional spam report and HTML analysis.

tools.name: list-sandbox-projects
tools.description: List all sandbox projects and their inboxes in your Mailtrap account.

tools.name: create-sandbox-project
tools.description: Create a new sandbox project to group test inboxes.

tools.name: delete-sandbox-project
tools.description: Delete a sandbox project and all its inboxes.

tools.name: create-sandbox-inbox
tools.description: Create a new sandbox test inbox within a project.

tools.name: get-sandbox-inbox
tools.description: Get sandbox inbox details including SMTP credentials, email counts, and status.

tools.name: update-sandbox-inbox
tools.description: Update a sandbox inbox name or email username.

tools.name: delete-sandbox-inbox
tools.description: Delete a sandbox inbox and all its messages.

tools.name: clean-sandbox-inbox
tools.description: Delete all messages from a sandbox inbox without deleting the inbox itself.

tools.name: get-sending-stats
tools.description: Get email sending statistics (delivery, bounce, open, click, spam rates) for a date range with optional breakdowns.

tools.name: list-email-logs
tools.description: List sent email logs (delivery history) with optional pagination and filters.

tools.name: get-email-log-message
tools.description: Get a single email log message by ID to inspect delivery status and event history.

tools.name: list-sending-domains
tools.description: List sending domains and their DNS verification status.

tools.name: get-sending-domain
tools.description: Get a sending domain by ID and its verification status, with optional DNS setup instructions.

tools.name: create-sending-domain
tools.description: Create a new sending domain.

tools.name: delete-sending-domain
tools.description: Delete a sending domain.

mailtrap_api_token.title: Mailtrap API Token
mailtrap_api_token.description: Your Mailtrap API token for authentication. Get your token at: https://mailtrap.io/api-tokens

default_from_email.title: Default From Email
default_from_email.description: Default sender email address (optional, but required for sending emails). Domain must be verified in Mailtrap: https://mailtrap.io/sending/domains

mailtrap_account_id.title: Mailtrap Account ID
mailtrap_account_id.description: Your Mailtrap account ID (optional). Find it at: https://mailtrap.io/account-management

mailtrap_test_inbox_id.title: Mailtrap Sandbox ID
mailtrap_test_inbox_id.description: Sandbox ID for sandbox mode (optional). Find it at: https://mailtrap.io/inboxes
